subject: feat(structure): add insert before/after controls for rows and columns
body:
Users can now insert a new row above/below (or column before/after) a
selected section instead of only appending at the end. When a section
is selected and the max of 4 hasn't been reached, two insert buttons
appear alongside the existing delete button. The selection automatically
tracks the original section after insertion.

Tags: layout, structure, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
